title: Implement people graph database tools
description: Create people.ts tool module with functions to create, get, update, and log interactions with people. Support fuzzy name matching and relationship tracking for email-to-person linking.
acceptance_criteria: create_person function inserts new people records with name, relationship_type, how_known, notes
get_person function returns full record by name using fuzzy matching
update_person function merges new notes into existing record
log_interaction function inserts interactions record and updates last_interaction_at
get_lapsed_contacts function returns people sorted by last_interaction_at with threshold filter
All functions return JSON strings and never throw exceptions
All database queries use parameterized statements

title: Add people tools to agent system
description: Register people graph tools in agent.ts tool definitions and executor, and update system prompt to include people index in the live context.
acceptance_criteria: People tool definitions added to TOOL_DEFINITIONS array
PEOPLE_TOOL_NAMES set created with all people tool names
executeTool function routes people tools to executePeopleTool
buildSystemPrompt loads people index from database and includes in People Index block
People index shows names and relationship types for all known people

title: Implement task confirmation flows
description: Add confirmation pattern support for task operations (create, complete, delete, update) by intercepting these tools in the agent loop and saving confirmation payloads.
acceptance_criteria: CONFIRMATION_GATED_TOOLS updated to include create_task, complete_task, delete_task, update_task
ConfirmationAction type extended with task action types
ConfirmationPayload data field supports task data types
Task confirmation payloads include task details in human-readable summary
Agent intercepts task write operations and returns synthetic pending_confirmation results
showConfirmationKeyboard flag set to true when task confirmations are saved

title: Implement task confirmation executor
description: Add task confirmation execution logic to orchestrator index.ts to handle confirmed task operations by calling the appropriate Todoist API endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: executeConfirmation function handles task confirmation actions
create_task confirmations call executeToDoistTool with create_task operation
complete_task confirmations call executeToDoistTool with complete_task operation
delete_task confirmations call executeToDoistTool with delete_task operation
update_task confirmations call executeToDoistTool with update_task operation
All task confirmations return success/error messages to user
Confirmation payloads are cleared after execution

title: Implement email implied action detection
description: Add logic to detect calendar events and tasks implied in email content and propose adding them to calendar or Todoist with user confirmation.
acceptance_criteria: extract_implied_actions function analyzes email content for flight confirmations, meeting invites, deadlines
Function returns structured data with proposed calendar events and tasks
Agent can propose calendar events from email content using existing create_event confirmation flow
Agent can propose tasks from email content using task confirmation flow
Each implied action requires separate user confirmation
Email content parsing handles common patterns for dates, times, locations, and action items

title: Implement email-to-people linking
description: Add logic to link emails from known people to the people graph and offer to log interactions when emails are from or about known people.
acceptance_criteria: get_inbox_summary and get_thread functions check sender email addresses against people records
When email is from a known person, response includes person name and relationship
Agent can offer to log email interactions using log_interaction tool
Email sender matching handles common email address formats and display names
People linking works for both direct emails and emails mentioning known people in content
